extraction.one_line_summary: BONT Dries won from a 4-man breakaway after sprinters' teams miscalculated, leaving 1:11 gap with one lap to go
tactical_patterns: Sprinters' teams panicked only sub-30km despite precedent of breaks succeeding, revealing chronic gap estimation problems on technical finishes.
LOPEZ Juanpe caught in peloton split with under 20km remaining, suggesting pink jersey group deliberately shed GC fringe riders.
Breakaway consciously went easy mid-race after KOSTER Harry drew complaints, demonstrating negotiated effort management extends beyond finale.

rider_signals.BONT Dries: positive: won despite being expected to lead out as fastest sprinter, suggesting tactical deception or superior endurance after 156km
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: mechanical inside final km given same time under 3km rule, but position suggests less protection than expected for second-placed GC rider
rider_signals.LOPEZ Juanpe: negative: dropped in split with under 20km on sprinters' stage, exposing weakness in positioning or UAE team support post-ALMEIDA departure
rider_signals.KOSTER Harry: negative: chased too hard early causing breakaway confrontation, revealing poor tactical awareness that antagonized companions before finale
